title: Automations on notifying persons on the column when a email reply is recieved
excerpt: I Have integrated gmail into monday.com account and able to send email to the clients present in column in a board, but i want to create some more automations like notifying persons present in person column whenever the …

posts.author: Sagar (Neupane)
posts.cookedHtml: I Have integrated gmail into monday.com account and able to send email to the clients present in column in a board, but i want to create some more automations like notifying persons present in person column whenever the reply in that automated email arrives , how to do that?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Sagar,

Can I ask how you’re currently tracking email replies? Do you have any of these automations set up?

This will just help us understand the best route forward to set this up!
